Tarot (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $18,771,004Details
International Box Office $30,333,741
Worldwide Box Office $49,104,745
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $405,262
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $65,296
Total $470,558
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When a group of friends recklessly violates the sacred rule of Tarot readings—never use someone else’s deck—they unknowingly unleash an unspeakable evil trapped within the cursed cards. One by one, they come face to face with fate and end up in a race against death to escape the future foretold in their readings.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,503,012 (34.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.89 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$8,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,104 opening theaters/3,104 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $19,849,797

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 3rd, 2024 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: May 1st, 2024 (Wide), released as Les Cartes du Mal (France)
May 1st, 2024 (Wide), released as Tarot - Carta da Morte (Portugal)
May 2nd, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
May 2nd, 2024 (Wide), released as Tarot (Таро: Карта смерти) (Russia (CIS))
May 2nd, 2024 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
Video Release: May 28th, 2024 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for horror violence, terror, bloody images, some strong language and drug content.
(Rating bulletin 2824 (cert #54310), 3/6/2024)
Running Time: 92 minutes
Filming location (country): Serbia
Social setting: College, Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

When a group of friends recklessly violates the sacred rule of Tarot readings—never use someone else’s deck—they unknowingly unleash an unspeakable evil trapped within the cursed cards. One by one, they come face to face with fate and end up in a race against death to escape the future foretold in their readings.
